top_signals.title: Bitcoin peels back to $62K as Fed-wary futures traders cut risk: Is the BTC rally over?
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin hovered around the $62,000 mark following a spike in oil prices, escalating hot war in Iran and traders’ move to cut risk ahead of a Federal Reserve policy statement.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Two-Year Yield Near 2026 High in Global Bond Selloff
top_signals.summary: The two-year US Treasury yield climbed back toward last month’s peak amid a selloff in global bond markets as rising oil prices rekindled worries about inflation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Strait of Hormuz Is Iran's 'New Nuclear Weapon' Says Miller
top_signals.summary: Aaron David Miller, senior fellow at Carnegie Endowment for International Peace, joined Balance of Power to discuss the recent escalation in the Middle East. He said Iran will go to "extreme lengths" to ensure it exercises some control over the Strait of Hormuz. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Felons, Fraudsters Flog Offensive Cybersecurity Startup
top_signals.summary: A cybersecurity startup dangling millions of dollars to acquire zero-day security vulnerabilities in popular software is run by a pair of far-right conspiracy theorists and convicted felons whose most recent ventures included fake intelligence companies and a now-defunct AI-based lobbying platform they operated under assumed names.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Philip R. Lane: AI and monetary policy
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Policy paper: Financial Inclusion Committee
top_signals.summary: Information about the work of the Financial Inclusion Committee, including Terms of Reference and list of Committee members.
